title: PRD: Dark mode
text:
# PRD — Dark mode
Product area: Mobile App
Status: Not started
Author: Product team

## Problem
Customers repeatedly request dark mode. This appears in support tickets and NPS feedback for the Mobile App area.

## Proposed solution
Implement dark mode with configuration in workspace settings.

## Success metrics
Reduce Mobile App-related complaints by 30%; adoption > 40% in 60 days.

## Priority
Backlog — not yet prioritized.
